why: CHART: bounce off 7365 low turned into momentum breakout — 10:00 candle 7379->7395 closed on its high, reclaimed VWAP (7384), 15-min mom +0.33% accelerating. GEX CONFIRM: broke through the 7385 pika which is now a FLOOR ~10pts below entry, clean air overhead to next node 7460, negative-gamma regime means breakout extends not pins. Invalidation = loss of 7385 floor.

CHART: vertical +15pt impulse to new day high 7414 (100% range), extended +27pts above VWAP — classic 0DTE exhaustion/round-trip zone. GEX: net near-spot gamma decayed -26M->-9M, the negative-gamma trending fuel is fading toward neutral so the extension engine is dying; no opposing node until 7460 (too far to reach fast). Bank the big gain per MANAGE.

CHART: bull trap — 30min coil under 7421 FAILED to break up and instead flushed -23pts in one bar (7416->7393), lost VWAP (7398) = bearish bias, 5-min mom -0.33%. GEX CONFIRM: net near-spot gamma -38M (strong negative = levels break / flush extends), 7395 barney now directly OVERHEAD capping bounces (tight risk ~4pts above), only a thin 7385 pika between price and the 7370 barney = air below. Target break of 7385 -> 7370. Invalidation = reclaim of 7395/VWAP.

STOPPED OUT — thesis invalidated. 7385 pika held and REFORMED (didnt break to 7370), then price V-reversed and blew back through VWAP+7395 barney to 7409 (bear trap), trend flipped to UPTREND, fresh pika floor built at 7400. Reclaim of 7395/VWAP was my stated invalidation. Cut fast per MANAGE.

CHART: double-top rejection at 7451/7455.8 after an extended low-vol melt-up (+0.75% day, was 100% of range); price now rolling over and broke the 11:20-30 consolidation to 7443, momentum negative both 5m (-0.10%) and 15m (-0.07%). GEX CONFIRM: net near-spot gamma -50M (very strong negative = levels break, flush extends) AND nearest floor below = NONE (clean air pocket, no support), only structure is 7500 barney far overhead. This is cleaner than my 10:45 short (that had the 7385 pika right below which held; here there is no floor). Target VWAP 7412 then air below. Invalidation = reclaim of ~7452 double-top.

CHART: clean 18pt flush captured from the double-top (7443 entry -> 7424 new low), momentum 15m -0.40%. Banking into VWAP: the rising VWAP 7413 is only ~11pts below = day-long magnet/first real support and prime bounce zone; flush is mature and 0DTE puts round-trip fast on any bounce. GEX: still -48M/no-floor favors more downside but that is a gamble vs a certain big gain — per MANAGE, cap the 0DTE winner into the next support. Also redeems the 10:45 whipsaw.

CHART: continuation short — after the double-top flush, price coiled on VWAP then broke it decisively, now BELOW VWAP (7414) at 7407 = bearish, momentum accelerating 5m -0.19% / 15m -0.43%. GEX CONFIRM: -54M net gamma (very strong negative, levels break), nearest floor below = NONE, ~38pts clean air to the 7370 king barney which is also the morning-low support zone (7365) = natural round-trip target; 7420 barney caps overhead for a tight invalidation. Reclaim of 7420/VWAP = stop.

STOPPED OUT — invalidation hit. VWAP-break short faked out: price V-reversed 7407->7422 in one bar, reclaiming both VWAP (7414) and the 7420 barney = my stated stop. Second failed breakdown-short of the day; the -55M no-floor flushes keep V-reverting at VWAP instead of cascading to 7370. Cut fast per MANAGE, dont hope.
